{"id":"Synaxis-95je","title":"Merge InferenceGateway Code","description":"
## Context
Existing InferenceGateway/ code contains valuable functionality that should be migrated into the new Inference bounded context. This preserves existing investments while aligning with the new architecture.

## Technical Details
Migrate existing InferenceGateway/ code with:

**Discovery Phase:**
1. Analyze InferenceGateway/ directory structure
2. Identify all components and functionality
3. Map components to new architecture layers
4. Identify reusable code vs. code to refactor

**Migration Strategy:**

1. **Domain Layer:**
   - Extract domain models
   - Extract value objects
   - Extract domain events
   - Refactor to follow DDD patterns
   - Add missing invariants

2. **Application Layer:**
   - Extract commands and queries
   - Extract handlers
   - Refactor to use new domain model
   - Add validation

3. **Infrastructure Layer:**
   - Extract provider clients
   - Extract repository implementations
   - Refactor to use new abstractions
   - Add Cosmos DB event store

4. **API Layer:**
   - Extract controllers
   - Extract request/response models
   - Refactor to use new application services
   - Add streaming support

**Functionality to Preserve:**
- All existing provider integrations
- All existing routing logic
- All existing templates
- All existing user preferences
- All existing model configs
- All existing API endpoints

**Data Migration:**
- Migrate existing templates to new ChatTemplate aggregate
- Migrate existing preferences to new UserChatPreferences aggregate
- Migrate existing model configs to new ModelConfig aggregate
- Preserve all data relationships

**Testing:**
- Verify all migrated functionality works
- Compare old vs. new behavior
- Ensure no regressions
- Update integration tests

## Guardrails
- Preserve all existing functionality
- Don't break existing integrations
- Maintain backward compatibility where possible
- Test thoroughly before removing old code
- Use file-scoped namespaces
- Include proper XML documentation

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] InferenceGateway/ code analyzed
- [ ] Migration plan documented
- [ ] Domain layer migrated
- [ ] Application layer migrated
- [ ] Infrastructure layer migrated
- [ ] API layer migrated
- [ ] Data migrated
- [ ] All functionality preserved
- [ ] No regressions
- [ ] Old code removed
- [ ] Integration tests updated
- [ ] Code follows solution conventions
- [ ] Build passes with zero warnings

## Dos and Don'ts
**DO:**
- Preserve all functionality
- Test thoroughly
- Document migration
- Maintain compatibility
- Write comprehensive tests

**DON'T:**
- Lose existing functionality
- Skip testing
- Break integrations
- Use NoWarn suppressions

## Must/Should/Must Not
- MUST preserve all functionality
- MUST test thoroughly
- MUST document migration
- MUST have tests
- MUST NOT lose functionality
- SHOULD maintain compatibility
- SHOULD update integration tests
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"rudimar@outlook.com","created_at":"2026-02-15T20:09:22Z","created_by":"Rudimar Ronsoni","updated_at":"2026-02-15T20:09:22Z","work_type":"mutex"}

{"description":"Migrate domain aggregates from Application/ControlPlane/Entities: Tenant, Project, User, ProviderModel, ModelAlias, ModelCost, RateLimitConfiguration, etc. This is the foundation.

## Deliverables
- New src/Modules/Inference/Inference.Domain project
- Domain aggregates: Tenant, Project, User, ProviderModel, ModelAlias, ModelCost, RateLimitConfiguration
- Value objects and domain events
- DDD patterns applied
- XML documentation
- No build warnings

## Parent Task
Synaxis-95je - Merge InferenceGateway Code"}

{"description":"Migrate commands, queries, handlers, routing logic (SmartRouter, TranslationPipeline), and interfaces. Move CQRS artifacts from WebApi/Features/Chat/.

## Deliverables
- New src/Modules/Inference/Inference.Application project
- Commands and handlers (CQRS)
- SmartRouter implementation
- TranslationPipeline
- Query handlers
- Application service interfaces
- XML documentation
- No build warnings

## Parent Task
Synaxis-95je - Merge InferenceGateway Code

## Dependencies
- Synaxis-q7hj (Create Inference.Domain project)"}

{"description":"Migrate provider clients, persistence, caching, EF migrations.

## Deliverables
- New src/Modules/Inference/Inference.Infrastructure project
- Provider clients (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
- Repository implementations
- EF Core DbContext and migrations
- Caching infrastructure
- External service clients
- XML documentation
- No build warnings

## Parent Task
Synaxis-95je - Merge InferenceGateway Code

## Dependencies
- Synaxis-l4ci (Create Inference.Application project)"}

{"description":"Migrate controllers, minimal API endpoints, middleware. Remove after verification.

## Deliverables
- Update src/Modules/Inference/Inference.Api project
- Migrate controllers from InferenceGateway
- Migrate minimal API endpoints
- Update middleware
- Map new application layer
- Update request/response models
- Add streaming support
- XML documentation
- No build warnings

## Parent Task
Synaxis-95je - Merge InferenceGateway Code

## Dependencies
- Synaxis-tdp6 (Create Inference.Infrastructure project)"}

{"description":"Update all project references, DI registrations, ensure clean build.

## Deliverables
- Update Synaxis.sln references
- Update Directory.Build.props
- Update DI registrations in AppHost
- Fix any broken references
- Ensure clean build
- Fix any analyzer warnings
- Update integration tests
- Verify all services resolve

## Parent Task
Synaxis-95je - Merge InferenceGateway Code

## Dependencies
- Synaxis-1hwh (Refactor Inference.Api)"}

{"description":"Delete old projects after verification.

## Deliverables
- Remove InferenceGateway/ directory
- Remove old project references from solution
- Verify no orphaned files
- Verify build passes
- Verify tests pass
- Update documentation
- Final migration report

## Parent Task
Synaxis-95je - Merge InferenceGateway Code

## Dependencies
- Synaxis-yk5b (Update solution references)"}

{"notes":"## Sub-Tasks Created

This large migration has been broken down into 6 manageable sub-tasks:

| Order | Task ID | Title | Status |
|-------|---------|-------|--------|
| 1 | Synaxis-q7hj | Create Inference.Domain project | Ready |
| 2 | Synaxis-l4ci | Create Inference.Application project | Blocked by #1 |
| 3 | Synaxis-tdp6 | Create Inference.Infrastructure project | Blocked by #2 |
| 4 | Synaxis-1hwh | Refactor Inference.Api | Blocked by #3 |
| 5 | Synaxis-yk5b | Update solution references | Blocked by #4 |
| 6 | Synaxis-6vm1 | Remove old InferenceGateway | Blocked by #5 |

## Dependency Chain
Domain → Application → Infrastructure → API → References → Remove

## Current Status
- Only Task 1 (Domain) is ready to start
- All others are blocked by their predecessors
- This parent task will be closed when all sub-tasks complete"}
